headline: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) Surpasses Earnings but Misses on Revenue Amid Landmark NSA Acquisition
summary: Public Storage (PSA) beat Q1 earnings estimates with Core FFO of $4.22 per share, but revenue slightly missed at $1.218B. The market eyes its landmark $10.5B acquisition of NSA.

headline: Public Storage Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: FRISCO, Texas, April 27, 2026--Public Storage (the "Company") (NYSE: PSA) announced today its results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026 and its updated outlook for full-year 2026. Net income and core funds from operations ("Core FFO") per share for the quarter are presented below:

headline: What's going on in today's pre-market session: S&P500 movers
summary: The US market is yet to commence its session on Monday, but let's get a preview of the pre-market session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the early market movements.
